getTradeableOrder(address,address,bytes3.details: **MUST** revert if the order conditions are not met.

params.ctx: The context of the order (bytes32(0) if Merkle tree is used, otherwise the H(params))
params.offchainInput: Off-chain input (similar to Balancer `userData`); currently unused
params.owner: The owner of the order (usually a contract)
params.staticInput: Conditional order type-specific data known at time of creation for all discrete orders

returns._0: order Tradeable order for submission to the CoW Protocol API

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

getTradeableOrder(address,address,bytes3.notice: Get a tradeable order that can be posted to the CoW Protocol API and would pass signature validation.
